name: tkw-dnd
display_name: The Known World — OSRIC + Dark Dungeons + Cepheus
description: AI-refereed AD&D 1e / OSRIC game in The Known World, a fresh setting forked from the Greyhawk engine. Shares the same machinery — the engine owns the math, the database owns the truth, the model narrates — but runs an independent campaign database and its own world canon. The 1e rules corpus is shared read-only with the Greyhawk install.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API key (optional)
anthropic_api_key.description: Enables Pass-2 (Haiku) narration validation. Leave blank to run the local checks only — the game works either way.
